title: Bank of Canada Announces 2025-26 Scholarship Recipients
summary: The Bank of Canada announced recipients of its 2025-26 scholarship awards targeting students from underrepresented groups. This is an internal diversity and inclusion initiative with no relevance to financial markets or macroeconomic conditions.
key_points: Bank of Canada released scholarship award recipients for 2025-26
Target groups include students with disabilities, Indigenous students, LGBTQ2S+ students, francophones, and visible minorities
why_it_matters: This announcement has no relevance to financial markets, economic policy, trading, or investment. It is a diversity scholarship program announcement from a central bank that does not impact monetary policy, interest rates, currency markets, or any market-relevant indicators.
